title: LEVEL_REJECTION_GATE: block bear LEVEL-tier level_rejection entries
hypothesis: BEARISH_REVERSAL LEVEL-tier entries fire on two distinct trigger types: level_rejection (counter-trend fade of a resistance touch) and level_reclaim (bull reclaim as context for bear entry). The level_rejection subset is systematically unprofitable: IS n=22 avg -$584/trade (-$13,389 total). Blocking it removes the dominant IS drag while leaving level_reclaim and all other tiers intact.

evidence.method: Engine-level backtest (use_real_fills=True, cascade effects fully simulated)

cascade_note: Gate fires BEFORE quality lock is set — blocked trades do not consume the day's LEVEL quality slot. This allows cascade: 5 IS days where a blocked level_rejection entry unlocked a subsequent trade (net additive). The corrected gate includes winning_side=='P' guard to prevent incorrectly blocking BULL level_reclaim LEVEL trades (initial implementation bug caught and fixed in the same session).
oos_note: OOS removes 3 trades net -$682 in losses (net positive for candidate). 5/19 is a +$2,072 winner that gets removed — this is the only OOS loser for the gate. The gate correctly keeps 5/08 +$1,130 BULL level_reclaim LEVEL trade.
cost_estimate: $0 additional per day (engine parameter change, no new data fetch)
production_change: Set block_level_rejection: true in automation/state/params.json AND automation/state/aggressive/params.json
